THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLER, DEBORAH  SHINING STAR DYEWORKS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RIGGERT, KEITH - UPS KEITH RIGGERT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
